dialog_d8c4.description: Command handler for specialized sub-dialogs (Add/Remove links, Building Management).

0x1847.description: The primary list or container control displaying linkable objects. Handled via SendDlgItemMessage with custom WM_USER messages (0x403, 0x405, 0x40c).

0x1848.description: Button to add a link. Triggers UI_Vector_Tracker_Replace_Object_at_Offset_4_Logic.

0x1849.description: Button to remove a selected link. Queries selection from 0x1847 and triggers Collection_Notify_Update_if_NotEmpty_Logic.

0x00eb.description: Triggers a full refresh of the sub-dialog via UI_SubDialog_TypeD8C4_Full_Refresh_Logic_d79c.

0x1841.description: Button or trigger to display the Colony Status Report message box.

0x184a.description: Updates the building manager state and posts a notification message (0x203) to the parent window.

0x184b.description: Spawns a new sub-dialog factory with ID 0x27 (UI_SubDialog_Factory_Create_and_Show_by_ID_af40).
